author: Serilum
title: Collective
description: 🎓 Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods.

author: Serilum
title: Villager Names
description: 🧑‍🌾 Gives all villager entities a default or custom name to liven up the world.

author: Serilum
title: Starter Kit
description: 📦 Give all new players joining the world configurable starter gear, items and/or potion effects. It can overwrite the initial inventory, or add the items after. Compatible with FTB Team Islands.

author: Serilum
title: Double Doors
description: 🚪 Multiple identical double doors, trapdoors and fence gates can be opened simultaneously.

author: Serilum
title: Difficulty Lock
description: 🔒 Sets a difficulty in any world, optionally locked, or force a hardcore mode requirement.

author: Serilum
title: Tree Harvester
description: 🌲 Harvest full trees and huge mushrooms instantly with an axe. Includes fast leaf decay and sapling placement.

author: Serilum
title: Full Brightness Toggle
description: 🔆 Press G to toggle the brightness/gamma in-game to maximum and get fullbright night vision.

author: Serilum
title: Dismount Entity
description: 🚏 Allows players to dismount/remove/exit entities/mobs from mounted entities without breaking them.

author: Serilum
title: Superflat World No Slimes
description: 🙅 Removes those pesky slimes when you're trying to be creative in a superflat world.

author: Serilum
title: Healing Campfire
description: 🔥🩹 Creates an area around the (soul) campfire where players and passive mobs receive regeneration.

author: Serilum
title: Inventory Totem
description: 🎴 Makes the totem of undying effect work when it's anywhere in the inventory.

author: Serilum
title: Easy Elytra Takeoff
description: 🛫 Allows easy takeoff by elytra/colytra with a firework from the ground without jumping.

author: Serilum
title: Infinite Trading
description: ♾ Prevents villager trades from locking up, making them always available. Trade away!

author: Serilum
title: Dragon Drops Elytra
description: 🐉 A minimalistic mod that makes the Ender Dragon drop an elytra on death.

author: Serilum
title: Stack Refill
description: 📚 Automatically refills the player's hand when using the final item if a replacement exists.

author: Serilum
title: Village Spawn Point
description: 🏙 Sets the spawn point in a new world to the center of a village.

author: Serilum
title: Fish On The Line
description: 🐟 Rings a bell held in the offhand when something's on the line while fishing.

author: Serilum
title: Passive Shield
description: 🛡 The shield is hidden and provides protection passively when held idle in the offhand.

author: Serilum
title: Realistic Bees
description: 🐝 Tiny bees, or big! Bigger group spawns, increased hive space, stinger functionality and more.

author: Serilum
title: Just Player Heads
description: 🗿 Allows the collection of player heads via command or death event.

author: Serilum
title: Biome Spawn Point
description: 🌲 Allows specifying which biome players will spawn in on new world creation.

author: Serilum
title: Weaker Spiderwebs
description: 🕸 Breaks spider webs/cobwebs with a configurable delay when walking through.

author: Serilum
title: Scaffolding Drops Nearby
description: 🏗 When breaking a scaffolding block, all chained blocks will drop at the block's position.

author: Serilum
title: Zombie Horse Spawn
description: 🧟‍♂🐴 Allows zombie horses to spawn with a zombie riding it and other tweaks.

author: Serilum
title: Ore Harvester
description: ⛏️ Harvest entire ore veins instantly and drop ore items at the initial block position. An updated alternative to the vein miner / veinminer mods.

author: Serilum
title: Skeleton Horse Spawn
description: ☠🐴 Allows skeleton horses to spawn naturally with a skeleton riding it and other tweaks.

author: Serilum
title: Areas
description: ✍️ Create custom named regions/towns/zones with a radius using signs, with join/leave messages via GUI.

author: Serilum
title: Shulker Drops Two
description: 🟪 Allows Shulkers to drop two or more shells and ignore their default drop chance.

author: Serilum
title: Just Mob Heads
description: 🗿 Adds a configurable chance for mobs to drop their head, using vanilla resources only.

author: Serilum
title: Keep My Soil Tilled
description: 🌱 Keeps farmland soil tilled below a stem block (melon/pumpkin) after harvesting.

author: Serilum
title: Advancement Screenshot
description: 📸 Takes a screenshot every time an advancement is achieved. Document your progress!

author: Serilum
title: No Animal Tempt Delay
description: 😍 Removes the cooldown in between trying to attract animals with their desired food.

author: Serilum
title: Grass Seeds
description: 🌱 Allows players to use normal seeds to transform dirt into (tall) grass.

author: Serilum
title: GUI Clock
description: ⏰ Shows the time/days played in the GUI/HUD with a clock in the inventory.

author: Serilum
title: Crying Portals
description: 🟣 Allows the creation of nether portals with crying obsidian blocks.

author: Serilum
title: Mooshroom Tweaks
description: 🐮🍄 Allows both red and brown mooshrooms to spawn naturally in their biome.

author: Serilum
title: No Hostiles Around Campfire
description: 🔥 Prevents hostile mob spawns and burns them around the campfire in a configurable radius.

author: Serilum
title: Nether Portal Spread
description: 🔮 Spreads (nether) blocks to the overworld around nether portals in a configurable radius.

author: Serilum
title: Snowballs Freeze Mobs
description: ☃️ Hitting mobs with a snowball will freeze them for a configurable amount of time.

author: Serilum
title: Configurable Extra Mob Drops
description: ✏️ Add any extra item drops to entities via commands and config, drop chance supported.

author: Serilum
title: Despawning Eggs Hatch
description: 🥚 Chicken eggs on hay blocks hatch safely into chicks just before they despawn.

author: Serilum
title: GUI Compass
description: 🧭 Shows direction and coordinates in the GUI/HUD with a compass in the inventory.

author: Serilum
title: Anvil Restoration
description: 🔨 Repair placed anvils with iron ingots and damage them with obsidian.

author: Serilum
title: Replanting Crops
description: 🌱 Automatically replants/replaces/reseeds crops harvested with a hoe by using the drops. Works with wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroots, netherwart and cocoa beans.

author: Serilum
title: Random Village Names
description: 🌆 All villages receive a randomized name, shown in the GUI via the Areas mod.

author: Serilum
title: Extended Bone Meal
description: ☘ Extends bonemeal behaviour. Instant grow with sneak, grow netherwart+cacti+sugarcane and other tweaks.

author: Serilum
title: Grindstone Sharper Tools
description: ⚔ The grindstone (wet stone) can temporarily increase the damage of tools used on it.

author: Serilum
title: Hide Experimental Warning
description: ❌ Hides the Experimental Settings Warning when trying to create or load a modded world.

author: Serilum
title: Fixed Anvil Repair Cost
description: 💰 Patches the anvil to set the default level cost, material cost and percentage repaired.

author: Serilum
title: Random Shulker Colours
description: 🎲 Gives new shulker spawns a random shell color based on a configurable list.

author: Serilum
title: Simple Menu
description: 🖼️ Adds basic functionality to edit the style and buttons of Minecraft's main menu, change the window title and set a new icon.

author: Serilum
title: More Zombie Villagers
description: 🧟‍♀️🌾 Allows changing the default chance a zombie spawns as the villager variant.

author: Serilum
title: Giant Spawn
description: 🧟‍♂️ Allows giants to spawn naturally with custom AI (based on zombies) and other tweaks.

author: Serilum
title: Followers Teleport Too
description: 🐺 Whenever a player is teleported via a command, their pets will be teleported alongside them.

author: Serilum
title: First Join Message
description: 💬 Sends players who join a world for the first time a configurable message.

author: Serilum
title: Spiders Produce Webs
description: 🕷 Spiders and cave spiders can periodically produce a cobweb/spiderweb when a player is close.

author: Serilum
title: Grabby Mobs
description: 👾 Allows all mobs which can carry equipment to pick up items from the floor.

author: Serilum
title: Better Conduit Placement
description: ✔️ Place conduits in front, makes placing conduit prismarine blocks easier and other tweaks.

author: Serilum
title: Name Tag Tweaks
description: 📛 Adds nametag crafting recipe, command, and named entities drop their tag on death.

author: Serilum
title: Overworld Piglins
description: 🐷 Makes Piglins and Hoglins be able to survive in the overworld, unless they're weakened.

author: Serilum
title: Smaller Nether Portals
description: 🔮 Allows the creation of smaller nether portals, specifically 1x2, 1x3 and 2x2.

author: Serilum
title: Furnace Recycle
description: 🔨 All metal-containing items are recyclable in a furnace and return raw materials.

author: Serilum
title: Surface Mushrooms
description: 🍄 Mushrooms can be placed on the surface in daylight and in any brightness.

author: Serilum
title: Naturally Charged Creepers
description: 🔋 Allows creepers to spawn charged in order to increase the game's difficulty.

author: Serilum
title: Move Boats
description: 🛶 Allows players to easily move boats without breaking them by holding right click.

author: Serilum
title: Beautified Chat [Client]
description: 💬 A highly configurable mod to change the chat style and colour on the client.

author: Serilum
title: Move Minecarts
description: 🛒 Easily pick up and move minecarts without breaking them by holding right click.

author: Serilum
title: Softer Hay Bales
description: 🌾 Makes hay bales negate fall damage entirely, Assassin's Creed style.

author: Serilum
title: Bouncier Beds
description: 🛏 Makes players bounce configurably higher on beds and prevents fall damage on them.

author: Serilum
title: Sleep Sooner
description: 🛌 Also Sleep Later! Make players go to bed at a different time.

author: Serilum
title: Zombie Villagers From Spawner
description: 🧟‍♂ Returns the ability for zombie spawners to spawn the villager variant, removed in 1.11.

author: Serilum
title: Cycle Paintings
description: 🖼️ Easily cycle through placed paintings by right-clicking them with another painting in hand.

author: Serilum
title: Bigger Sponge Absorption Radius
description: 🧽 Each extra sponge block placed next to one another increases the water absorption radius.

author: Serilum
title: Better Spawner Control
description: ✔️ Disables mob spawners whenever they are surrounded by 5 torches.

author: Serilum
title: Crying Ghasts
description: 😭 Ghasts drop their tears periodically when a player is close, allowing sustainable farming.

author: Serilum
title: Wool Tweaks
description: 🐑 Makes various changes to wool-type block recipes, string conversion and the dyeing process.

author: Serilum
title: Welcome Message
description: ✉️ Easy to configure welcome messages for server players logging in with URL support.

author: Serilum
title: Better Beacon Placement
description: ✔️ Easily place beacon bases by right-clicking the beacons with mineral blocks.

author: Serilum
title: Campfire Spawn and Tweaks
description: 🔥 Respawn interdimensionally with short fire resistance inside a preferred campfire with altered block mechanics. Place unlit, lighting it will create a home camp spawn point. Remove waterlogging.

author: Serilum
title: Hide Hands
description: 🙌 Hide your offhand and/or main hand in first person, optionally while holding specific items like a torch, totem of undying or a shield.

author: Serilum
title: Underwater Enchanting
description: 🌊 Allows the use of the enchantment table under water with maximum levels via bookshelves.

author: Serilum
title: Zombie Proof Doors
description: 🧟‍♂ Prevents zombies from targeting and breaking down doors.

author: Serilum
title: Your Items Are Safe
description: 💀 Spawns a chest and armor stand with player items on death, a gravestone alternative.

author: Serilum
title: Flower Mimics
description: 👻 SpookyJam 2023: Be careful around flowers at night.. they might transform into monsters!

author: Serilum
title: Mineral Chance
description: 💎 Players can find minerals inside stone-type blocks when mining in the overworld and nether.

author: Serilum
title: Extract Poison
description: 🐍 Extract poison from cave spiders, pufferfish and bees with an empty glass bottle.

author: Serilum
title: Husk Spawn
description: 🏜 Adds a chance for husks to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a zombie.

author: Serilum
title: Random Bone Meal Flowers
description: 🎲 Randomizes the flowers spawned by bonemeal, allowing all (modded) types to spawn everywhere.

author: Serilum
title: Quick Right-Click
description: ✋ Adds a portable functionality to certain items, which allows for quick access without placement. Works with beds, crafting tables, ender chests and shulker boxes among others.

author: Serilum
title: Bottle Your Xp
description: 🍾 Allows the creation of experience bottles (bottles o' enchanting) from your own gathered xp.

author: Serilum
title: Bottled Air
description: 🍾 Allows players to breathe in empty glass bottles under water for more oxygen.

author: Serilum
title: Starter Structure
description: 🏛️ Allows the creation of buildings on initial world generation at spawn via schematic files.

author: Serilum
title: Mooshroom Spawn
description: 🐮🍄 Adds a chance for mooshrooms to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a cow.

author: Serilum
title: Respawning Shulkers
description: 🟪 Shulkers will respawn at their death location after a configurable delay, farm shells sustainably.

author: Serilum
title: What Durability?
description: ❌ Removes all durability from items, allowing infinite uses. Similar to Terraria and Stardew Valley.

author: Serilum
title: Always a Wither Skull
description: ☠ Makes wither skeletons always drop their skull on death.

author: Serilum
title: Enchanting Commands
description: 💫 Easy creation of (modded) enchanted items via commands with levels above the default limit.

author: Serilum
title: Recast
description: 🎣 Automatically re-casts the fishing rod line for a player when an item is caught.

author: Serilum
title: Pet Names
description: 🐈 Gives tamable baby animals a pre-defined name.

author: Serilum
title: Persistent Inventory Search
description: 🔎 Makes search queries remain inside the creative inventory during tab switching and closing.

author: Serilum
title: GUI Followers
description: 🐺 Shows a list in the GUI/HUD of all tamed non-sitting followers around.

author: Serilum
title: No Feather Trample
description: 🪶 Prevents farmland blocks from being trampled while having Feather/Slow Falling.

author: Serilum
title: Villager Death Messages
description: ⚰ Broadcasts an informational death message whenever a villager passes away.

author: Serilum
title: Conduits Prevent Drowned
description: ❌ Disables drowned zombie spawns around the player when the conduit effect is active.

author: Serilum
title: Bareback Horse Riding
description: 🐎 Allows riding horses without a saddle with tweaked game mechanics.

author: Serilum
title: Hidden Recipe Book
description: 📗 Toggle the visiblity of the recipe book icon in crafting GUI screens.

author: Serilum
title: Hoe Tweaks
description: 🌾 Faster crop block breaking, increased hoe radius and the ability to un-till soil.

author: Serilum
title: Transcending Trident
description: 🔱 Improves the trident. Hold a water bucket to use a more powerful riptide anywhere.

author: Serilum
title: End Portal Recipe
description: 📝 Makes the end portal craftable, movable and available in survival plus other tweaks.

author: Serilum
title: Vanilla Zoom
description: 🔍 Adds an on-the-go zoom functionality hotkey using the spyglass item.

author: Serilum
title: Stray Spawn
description: ☠ Adds a chance for strays to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a skeleton.

author: Serilum
title: Cave Spider Spawn
description: 🕷️ Adds a chance for cave spiders to spawn naturally underground instead of a spider.

author: Serilum
title: Hand Over Your Items
description: 🤝 Adds to ability for in-game players to give each other itemstacks without dropping/tossing them.

author: Serilum
title: All Loot Drops
description: 👝 Living entities drop all their possible loot in a configurable amount, looting enchant supported.

author: Serilum
title: Village Bell Recipe
description: 🔔 Makes the village bell item craftable via a recipe.

author: Serilum
title: Improved Sign Editing
description: 🪵 Better sign editing functionality. Shift to the next and previous line during typing.

author: Serilum
title: Death Backup
description: 💾 Creates back-ups of player inventories before death, which can be loaded via commands.

author: Serilum
title: Nutritious Milk
description: 🥛 Adds nutritious value to milk, filling up the food bar and saturation when consumed.

author: Serilum
title: Custom Credits
description: ©️ Allows changing the content and behaviour of the credits screen, including the end poem.

author: Serilum
title: GUI Effect Timer
description: ⌛ Displays time remaining text inside the mob effect badge on the screen.

author: Serilum
title: Compact Help Command
description: 🗜 Modifies the /help command to show all information, be colourful and have multiple pages.

author: Serilum
title: Edibles
description: 🍽 Makes lots of ingredients edible, after which the player receives a short status effect.

author: Serilum
title: Fire Spread Tweaks
description: 🔥 Disables the default firespread and makes fire go out after a configurable delay.

author: Serilum
title: Automatic Doors
description: 🚪 Automatically opens doors around the player and closes them with a configurable delay.

author: Serilum
title: Ice Prevents Crop Growth
description: 🧊 Crops growing with ice underneath will remain in the same stage, for design purposes.

author: Serilum
title: Passive Endermen
description: 👍 Prevent an enderman from teleporting, placing/picking up blocks (griefing) and attacking when looked at.

author: Serilum
title: World Border
description: 🌎 Allows the creation of a configurable world border, limiting the world size.

author: Serilum
title: Manure
description: 💩 Animals periodically drop manure, by default twice a day. Can be used as a bone meal substitute.

author: Serilum
title: Enchantment Level Cap Indicator
description: ⭐ Displays a symbol next to enchanted item tooltips when they reach their max level.

author: Serilum
title: Kelp Fertilizer
description: 🌿 Kelp seaweed naturally filters sea water for rich nutrients. Kelp works like bone meal.

author: Serilum
title: Underground Beacons
description: 🕳️ Allows beacons to function underground, no matter how many solid blocks are above it.

author: Serilum
title: Natural Charcoal
description: 🔥🌳 Burned out logs have a chance to generate charcoal, which are immune to fire.

author: Serilum
title: Set World Spawn Point
description: 🌎 Allows setting an exact custom spawn point for (newly) created worlds and spawn tweaks.

author: Serilum
title: TNT Breaks Bedrock
description: 🧨 Allows TNT to break bedrock, easy access to the nether roof!

author: Serilum
title: Pumpkillager's Quest
description: 🎃 SpookyJam 2022: Help out the Pumpkillager! With custom encounters, rewards and a boss fight you'll get immersed in the story. Spawn him by breaking a pumpkin in this spooky scary Halloween style mod!

author: Serilum
title: Configurable Mob Potion Effects
description: ✏️ Set potion effects for all living entities to have permanently and to inflict.

author: Serilum
title: Thorny Bush Protection
description: 🫐 Players walking through berry bushes won't receive damage while wearing leggings.

author: Serilum
title: Rain Be Gone Ritual
description: 🌧 Adds the ability to stop the rain via a multi-block structure ritual in survival.

author: Serilum
title: Current Game Music Track
description: 🎵 Temporarily show the song title of what's currently playing via the GUI.

author: Serilum
title: Faster Crouching
description: 🏃 Set the crouch/sneak speed of players to be the same as when walking and sprinting.

author: Serilum
title: Inventory Mending
description: 📖🔧 Allows mending items inside the inventory to be repaired without being equipped.

author: Serilum
title: Configurable Despawn Timer
description: ✏️ Allows items and experience orbs to remain longer, shorter or infinitely on the ground

author: Serilum
title: Random Sheep Colours
description: 🎲 Gives new sheep spawns a random wool/fleece color based on a configurable list.

author: Serilum
title: Omega Mute
description: Ω The only mod you'll need to have full control over individual in-game sound.

author: Serilum
title: Sticky Enchanting Lapis
description: 📖🔷 Allows lapis lazuli to remain in the enchanting table and be shared among players.

author: Serilum
title: Eroding Stone Entities
description: 🌊 Stone-type block entities left in flowing water turn into clay and sand.

author: Serilum
title: Breedable Killer Rabbit
description: 🐰 Makes the killer rabbit/bunny tamable and available by breeding.

author: Serilum
title: Quick Paths
description: 🚶 Create long paths instantly by setting a start and end point.

author: Serilum
title: Milk All The Mobs
description: 🥛 Allows sheep, llamas, pigs, donkeys, horses and mules to produce a bucket of milk.

author: Serilum
title: Paper Books
description: 📑📕 Allows the creation of books with 9 paper.

author: Serilum
title: Beautified Chat [Server]
description: 💬 A highly configurable mod to change the style and colour of chat messages server-wide.

author: Serilum
title: Global Narration Toggle
description: 🗣️ Makes the narrator setting global automatically, across instances. Turns the screen off and on. A better experience for all.

author: Serilum
title: Fall Through Slime
description: 🟩 Slime blocks no longer support your weight when idle, and you'll slowly fall through.

author: Serilum
title: Piglin Names
description: 🐷 Gives all piglins a default or custom name to liven up the world.

author: Serilum
title: Alternative World Save Location
description: 📍 Allows changing the default save file path of Minecraft worlds to outside instance scopes.

author: Serilum
title: The Vanilla Experience | TVE
description: 🌳 A light custom-coded 26.1.1 vanilla+ modpack which is interchangeable with an unmodded save.

author: Serilum
title: Silkier Touch
description: ⛏️✨ Extends Silk Touch functionality! Dragon eggs, spawners, cake, farmland and more!

author: Serilum
title: Recipe Commands
description: 💬 Receive the pattern and ingredients of any item recipe via chat commands.

author: Serilum
title: Cycle Title Screen Splash
description: 💦 The splash text on the main menu will keep changing after a configurable delay.

author: Serilum
title: Bogged Spawn
description: 🏹🍄 Adds a chance for bogged to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a skeleton.

author: Serilum
title: Screenshot Compression
description: 📸 Automatically compress screenshots taken in-game to lower file size with various config options.

author: Serilum
title: Easy Elevators
description: 🛗 Easily go up and down fast via multiblock elevators! Highly configurable, using existing resources.

author: Serilum
title: Save and Load Inventories
description: 💾 Save and load player inventories or kits to self and others by using commands.

author: Serilum
title: Wandering Trader May Leave
description: 💨 Adds a button to the Wandering Trader's screen which makes it disappear without violence.

author: Serilum
title: Random Mob Effects
description: 🎲 Randomly assign a (modded) potion effect to all hostile mobs in the world.

author: Serilum
title: April Fools
description: 🃏 Enables various silly and funny configurable features on April Fools' day!

author: Serilum
title: Breeze Spawn
description: 💨 Adds a chance for breezes to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a blaze.

author: Serilum
title: Player Tracking
description: 🔎 [PvP Mod] Allows the tracking of players via special trackers.

author: Serilum
title: Serilum's Client Bundle
description: 📦 A mod bundle of all client mods Serilum has released, create your own experience!

author: Serilum
title: Silence Mobs
description: 🙊 Silence or mute mobs and villager with The Silence Stick.

author: Serilum
title: Placeable Blaze Rods
description: 🕯 Makes blaze rods placeable as a custom block in the world, like end rods.

author: Serilum
title: Creative Block Replacer
description: 🔄 Allows easy switching in between placing and replacing blocks in creative mode.

author: Serilum
title: Where Did I Die?
description: 🪦 Shows and screenshots the player's coordinates in the chat after death, fully client-side!

author: Serilum
title: Healing Soup
description: 🍲 [PvP Mod] Soup heals hearts. Adds recipes for chocolate milk, cactus soup and stew.

author: Serilum
title: Player Tracking Compass
description: 🧭 [PvP Mod] Adds a Tracking Compass, which can track the nearest player's location.

author: Serilum
title: Ore Discovery Broadcast
description: ⛏️ Broadcasts a message to the server whenever a player finds an ore vein.

author: Serilum
title: Chorus Fruit Drops Nearby
description: 🍇 When breaking chorus plants, all chorus fruit will drop at the base position.

author: Serilum
title: Let's Parkour
description: 🦘 Adds various parkour related blocks to create an awesome track, made for ModFest: Carnival.

author: Serilum
title: Automatic Operator
description: 🤖 Automatically makes all or specific players OP in server environments when they log in.

author: Serilum
title: Daily Quests
description: 🧭 Complete randomly generated quests each day for experience and loot!

author: Serilum
title: Configurable Furnace Burn Time
description: ✏️ Allows changing the fuel burn time in furnaces globally via a config modifier.

author: Serilum
title: Humbling Bundle
description: ✖️2️⃣ Doubles all entity loot, to increase the speed of early game progress and late-game grinds. Inspired by the identically titled item in the binding of Isaac.

author: Serilum
title: Respawn Delay
description: ⏳ [PvP Mod] Players enter spectator mode on death for a configurable amount of time.

author: Serilum
title: Serilum's QoL Bundle
description: 📦 A mod bundle of all quality of life mods Serilum has released, lovely convenience!

author: Serilum
title: Altered Damage
description: 🔪 Alters damage taken and dealt by players and other entities with a modifier.

author: Serilum
title: Serilum's RPG Bundle
description: 📦 A mod bundle of all RPG mods Serilum has released, add realism and immersion!

author: Serilum
title: Player Death Kick
description: 💀 Kicks players on death with a customizable disconnect message.

author: Serilum
title: Entity Information
description: ℹ️ Displays entity information on hit with the Information Stick. Useful for debugging and developing.

author: Serilum
title: Shadow Mounts
description: 🐎 SpookyJam 2024: Turn horses into their Shadow Variant via a unique saddle!

author: Serilum
title: Vote Command
description: 🗳 Adds a configurable /vote command which tells players how and where to vote.

author: Serilum
title: Quicksaving
description: 💾 Adds quicksave and quickload capabilities via F6/F8. Works interdimensionally and optionally client-side only.

author: Serilum
title: Trample Everything
description: 🥾 A highly configurable mod which makes players trample everything, not just crops.

author: Serilum
title: Serilum's Spawn Bundle
description: 📦 A mod bundle of all spawn mods Serilum has released, see different mob types!

author: Serilum
title: Serilum's Extra Bundle
description: 📦 A mod bundle of some uncategorized mods Serilum has released, add spice and silliness!

author: Serilum
title: Serilum's Customization Bundle
description: 📦 A mod bundle of customization mods Serilum has released, set up your modpack instance!

author: Serilum
title: Extended Creative Inventory
description: 👜 Adds all items which by default aren't in the creative inventory to a tab.

author: Serilum
title: Adventure Mode Tweaks
description: 🏰 Various Adventure Mode mechanic improvements! Paintings, Item Frames, Minecarts, Boats and more.

author: Serilum
title: Spooky Jams
description: 🫙 SpookyJam 2025: Adds various craftable "Spooky Jams", which give effects when consumed.

author: Serilum
title: OP Permission Fallback
description: 🍀 Players with the "minecraft.op" permission will be seen as /op(erators) in-game. Compatible with LuckPerms.

author: Serilum
title: Void Vanguards
description: 🛰️ ModJam 2025: A lore filled quest mod about conflict between The Vanguard and Voidborn.
